narratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन को लगता है कि किलेबंदी से रूसी सेना को कुछ दिन रोकने में कामयाबी मिल सकती है।
narratives.reasoning: This quote makes a prediction about the potential outcome of Ukraine's defensive strategy, speculating that it might succeed in stopping the Russian army for a few days.

narratives.evidence_quote: रूस के खिलाफ युद्ध में यूक्रेन पहले ही हथियारों की कमी झेल रहा है।
narratives.reasoning: This statement undermines Ukraine's military capability by highlighting its shortage of weapons, which fits the sub-narrative of discrediting the Ukrainian military.

narratives.evidence_quote: अमेरिका ने यूक्रेन के लिए हथियारों की मंजूरी तो दे दी है लेकिन, अभी तक हथियारों की खेप यूक्रेन तक नहीं पहुंच पाई है।
narratives.reasoning: This criticizes Western (specifically American) support for Ukraine by pointing out the failure to deliver promised weapons, highlighting incompetence or failure in diplomatic/military aid.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Speculating war outcomes: Russian army will lose all the occupied territories
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन का यह कदम रूसी सेना को खदेड़ने के लिए है।
subnarratives.reasoning: The quote directly states that Ukraine's plan to build fortifications is aimed at 'driving out' (खदेड़ने) the Russian army, which implies a speculative outcome where Russia loses the territories it occupies.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन को लगता है कि किलेबंदी से रूसी सेना को कुछ दिन रोकने में कामयाबी मिल सकती है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement speculates on a potential, short-term tactical outcome of the conflict (delaying the Russian army for a few days), which supports the parent narrative of speculating war outcomes but does not fit any of the specific subnarrative definitions provided.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Discrediting Ukrainian military
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन को लगता है कि किलेबंदी से रूसी सेना को कुछ दिन रोकने में कामयाबी मिल सकती है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly undermines the effectiveness and capability of the Ukrainian military by suggesting their major defensive plan (a 10,000 km fortification) might only delay the Russian army for 'a few days', portraying their efforts as ultimately ineffective.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Situation in Ukraine is hopeless
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन के खूबसूरत शहर श्मशान बन चुके हैं
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement paints a bleak, hopeless picture of Ukraine's present and future, describing its beautiful cities as having turned into 'cremation grounds', which aligns with portraying the situation as having no viable positive future.
